texto: God forbid that I should boast of being poor, gentle, and meek. But I am striving to attain these virtues. Every day the exercises, and indeed the whole ascetic discipline of my Yoga, make it easier for the grace of Christ to flow in me. I feel my hunger for God growing, and my thirst for righteousness, and my desire to be a Christian in the full strength of the word- to be for Christ, to be of Christ, without any half-measures of reservations.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jean Déchanet sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “God forbid that I should boast of being poor, gentle, and meek. But I am striving to attain these…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, catholic, christ, útil em momentos de christ e christian.
